description: Get all glammed up in these animal print heels from catwalk. Crafted with an eye for high fashion and a feel for superior comfort, this pair is a closet essential. Style this with a feminine top and skinny jeans or a little black dress. Heel: 4&rdquo Upper Animal print fabric interconnected strap for added style and snug Fit Soft feel lining for extra comfort Synthetic leather and fabric lined footbed for added style and comfort Outsole TPR outsole with heel Textured pattern on the forefoot and heel for better grip Sandal Care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
